6:["$","h2",null,{"children":"How It Works"}]
7:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embed"}],": Query text is converted to a 384-dimension vector via BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 (loaded through ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Search"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," performs nearest neighbor search on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]," quantized vectors stored in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_episodes"}]," table"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Score"}],": Cosine similarity between query and stored vectors"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank"}],": Results ordered by similarity (highest first)"]}],"\n"]}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Embedding Model"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," exclusively, loaded via the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," library:"]}]
a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Property"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Value"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Model"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Dimensions"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"384"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Quantization"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["int8 (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Runtime"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Local only (no API calls)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Library"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]}]]}]]}]]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"The model runs entirely locally — no OpenAI API key or network calls are required for embedding generation."}]
c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Vector Storage"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Vectors are stored in a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," virtual table:"]}]
e:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"-- Internal sqlite-vec table (created automatically)\nCREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vec_episodes USING vec0(\n  embedding int8[384]\n);\n","language":"sql"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Usage via recall()"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":["Vector search is performed automatically as part of the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," method. There is no separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_search()"}]," API:"]}]
11:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory()\n\n# recall() internally performs vector + FTS5 hybrid search\nresults = mem.recall(\"deployment strategy\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"Score: {r['score']:.3f} — {r['content'][:80]}\")\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance Characteristics"}]

24:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Vector Search — Semantic Similarity with Embeddings"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Deep dive into Mnemosyne's vector search: how embeddings are generated via fastembed, stored in sqlite-vec, and queried for semantic similarity matching in episodic memory."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"author","href":"https://github.com/axdsan"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"author","content":"Abdias Moya"}],["$","meta","4",{"name":"keywords","content":"AI memory,agent memory,persistent memory,BEAM,Mnemosyne,SQLite,vector search,Hermes plugin"}],["$","meta","5",{"name":"robots","content":"index, follow"}],["$","link","6",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:title","content":"Vector Search — Semantic Similarity with Embeddings"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:description","content":"Deep dive into Mnemosyne's vector search: how embeddings are generated via fastembed, stored in sqlite-vec, and queried for semantic similarity matching in episodic memory."}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","meta","10",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","11",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Vector Search — Semantic Similarity with Embeddings"}],["$","meta","12",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Deep dive into Mnemosyne's vector search: how embeddings are generated via fastembed, stored in sqlite-vec, and queried for semantic similarity matching in episodic memory."}],["$","meta","13",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","link","14",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico?favicon.0x3dzn~oxb6tn.ico","sizes":"256x256","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","$L26","15",{}]]
